headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -77.3)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 60% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 139 quotes and an overwhelming 119 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting forcefully today.
• The score of 70.4 sits in the upper half of the 167-day range (-1.1 to 169.0), signalling well above-average frustration levels.
• Optimism recovered noticeably from yesterday's -52.0 to -26.5, though it remains in negative territory near the lower end of its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
